title: Add column of icons/image

posts.author: kenny_skope (kenny sköpe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone, I had an implementation idea for a feature.

Adding a column where we could put an icon or an image to better differentiate tasks.

For example, if we have a group of tasks and our tasks are for different companies, to easily spot them with their logo in the first column, that would be cool and much more visual, especially if we work with many different clients.

Like I did in the screenshot with emojis, but to use images of logos, etc.

Capture d’écran 2024-05-06 à 11.37.40130×785 19.7 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the request @kenny_skope !

And welcome to the community
